script_en: It's about time you showed up Fox. You're the only hope for our world.
script_pt: Que bom que apareceram\nStar Fox! Voces sao nossa\nunica esperanca.

script_en: I'll do my best! Andross won't have his way with me.
script_pt: Vou sentar o dedo!\nDessa vez o Andross nao\nvai se dar bem!

script_en: This is Peppy. All systems go.
script_pt: Aqui é o Peppy.\nTodos os sistemas\nfuncionando.

script_en: I see em’ up ahead. Let's rock and roll!
script_pt: Estou vendo eles ali\nVamo botar o pau\npra torar!

script_en: Slippy, watch out! Bogey on your tail!
Thanks Fox. I thought they had me.
script_pt: Obrigado Fox.\nPensei que eu\ntava na merda.

script_en: You've got an enemy on your tail!
I'll get this one. Get the one behind me!
script_pt: Vou atrás desse.\nPega o vagabundo\natrás de mim!
Use o boost para\nir atrás dele!\n(C-LF)

script_en: I could use some help here Fox!
I guess I should be thankful.
Do a barrel roll! (Z or R)
Ah, so this is Star Fox?
Those who cross Andross will die!
Stop moving so I can squash you!
I will not be defeated by this worm!
You are starting to annoy me!

action: Fly under first four stone arches
Fly under first four stone arches

script_en: I found the target! Try to keep up.
